meaning: A delay in sound transmission during a call, usually caused by a poor internet connection.
definition: A delay in sound transmission during a call, usually caused by a poor internet connection.
example: There is a significant audio lag, making it hard to have a smooth conversation.

meaning: Distracting sounds in a person's physical environment during a call.
definition: Distracting sounds in a person's physical environment during a call.
example: Please mute yourself if you have background noise like traffic or construction.

meaning: A smaller, separate virtual room created during a larger online meeting for small group discussions.
definition: A smaller, separate virtual room created during a larger online meeting for small group discussions.
example: The host split us into breakout rooms to brainstorm ideas in smaller groups.

meaning: Hesitant or unwilling to turn on your webcam during a video call.
definition: Hesitant or unwilling to turn on your webcam during a video call.
example: Most of the team was camera shy today, so it was mostly an audio call.

meaning: To join a virtual meeting using a telephone instead of a computer internet connection.
definition: To join a virtual meeting using a telephone instead of a computer internet connection.
example: If your Wi-Fi is weak, you can dial in using the phone number in the invitation.

meaning: To schedule two different meetings or events at the same time.
definition: To schedule two different meetings or events at the same time.
example: I apologize, I am double-booked at 10 AM, so I must reschedule our chat.

definition: To take someone or something to a place and leave it there; to fall asleep.
example: I need to drop off this call five minutes early to attend another meeting.

meaning: A repetition of sound during a call caused by audio feedback from speakers.
definition: A repetition of sound during a call caused by audio feedback from speakers.
example: I hear an echo when you speak; please try using headphones.

meaning: Time spent interacting with colleagues directly, either in person or via video call.
definition: Time spent interacting with colleagues directly, either in person or via video call.
example: Even though we work remotely, getting some face time on video calls helps build trust.

meaning: A fixed time when a meeting must end or a participant must leave due to another commitment.
definition: A fixed time when a meeting must end or a participant must leave due to another commitment.
example: I have a hard stop at 3:00 PM, so we must finish our discussion by then.

meaning: To quickly join a virtual meeting or call.
definition: To quickly join a virtual meeting or call.
example: Can you hop on a quick call so we can resolve this design issue together?

meaning: The first meeting with a project team to align on goals and start the project.
definition: The first meeting with a project team to align on goals and start the project.
example: We will hold a kickoff meeting on Monday to introduce the new client project.

meaning: A list of topics and items to be discussed during a meeting.
definition: A list of topics and items to be discussed during a meeting.
example: I will send out the meeting agenda so everyone can prepare their updates.

meaning: A meeting held after a project is finished to analyze what went well and what went wrong.
definition: A meeting held after a project is finished to analyze what went well and what went wrong.
example: During the project postmortem, we discussed how to avoid timeline delays in the future.

meaning: To show the contents of your computer screen to other participants in a virtual meeting.
definition: To show the contents of your computer screen to other participants in a virtual meeting.
example: Let me share my screen so you can see the marketing graphics we prepared.

meaning: A quick update during a meeting to see how a specific task is progressing.
definition: A quick update during a meeting to see how a specific task is progressing.
example: Let's do a quick status check on the website launch before we move to marketing.

meaning: A phrase used to tell someone that their microphone is turned off during a call.
definition: A phrase used to tell someone that their microphone is turned off during a call.
example: We can see your lips moving, but you're muted; please turn on your microphone.
